perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman smiling and holding two small rabbit plushies in front of her. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of the two rabbit plushies (one blue, one cream) sitting on a flat surface. (3) Hands enter the frame and use an alcohol wipe from a blue packet to clean the plushies. (4) A white ribbon with 'DIOR' printed on it is wrapped around the neck of the blue rabbit and tied into a bow. (5) The blue rabbit and a pink flower-shaped object are placed into a clear plastic bag decorated with gold polka dots. (6) A cartoon sticker is used to seal the bag. (7) The final shot shows two identical gift bags ready for distribution.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced hip-hop background music begins with a strong bass beat. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Chinese. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as the sounds of plastic crinkling and paper rustling become audible during the cleaning and packaging process. (3) The lyrics 'I just gotta get it watch me go' are heard in the BGM. (4) The audio concludes with the music fading out alongside rhythmic plastic crinkling sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '真的可以給 記得私訊給我 還有一個誰要? 可留言' (I can really give them, remember to DM me. Who wants the other one? Leave a comment). (2) Decorative Text: '(消毒一下)' (Sanitizing a bit) - neutral tone. (3) Decorative Text: '變漂亮一下' (Make it pretty) - cheerful tone. (4) Hook Text: '只給拉發霉會太過份 所以一起送韓國唇彩' (Giving only Labubu would be too much, so I'm giving Korean lip gloss together) - generous tone. (5) Functional Text: '想要的人請在底下留言喔' (Those who want it, please leave a comment below) - instructional tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing at the beginning; only her hands are visible during the packaging process.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in what looks like a bedroom with a dark door visible. It then transitions to a beige, flat tabletop surface for the packaging sequence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Demonstration -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional giveaway designed to increase social media engagement. The creator shows popular Labubu-style rabbit plushies, demonstrates herself cleaning and carefully packaging them with luxury-branded ribbons and bonus gifts (lip gloss) to increase perceived value, and explicitly asks viewers to comment to win.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While Dior ribbon is used, it appears to be repurposed for a personal giveaway rather than an official brand partnership.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of luxury ribbons for DIY packaging, trendy toy culture involvement.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video capitalizes on the 'unboxing' and 'packaging' ASMR trends combined with influencer giveaway mechanics to drive follower interaction.
